form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Warrnambool (22.52) in a Free For All, finishing a 6 length eighth. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 13 starts. Looks a leading chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Last start winner at The Meadows over 525m running a time of 29.68. Recorded the quickest time on the card last time. Stay with him.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished 6th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 530m at Angle Park behind Needs Space beaten 4.5 lengths (30.79). Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turning off back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Backs up after winning by half a length at Bendigo (27.75) beating Impress Moana in a Special conditions race on April 5 five days ago. Likely to find this a lot tougher and she needs to find another gear.

form.formComment: Good win last start as odds-on favourite by 1.4 lengths over 520m at this track in a handy 29.84, beating Never Ever Late. Looks well placed and should be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Good performance after racing just off the speed to win by 2 lengths at Ballarat over 450m (25.02) beating Paw Sapphire in Grade 4/5 on April 1. Should be around the mark.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to post a big 5.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 22.38 for the 400m trip. Harder here but worth including in multiples.
